zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford於1420年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II23歲，母親Isobel de Home20歲。他於1445年與Margaret Douglas在蘇格蘭洛包爾聖 波斯維爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年5月8日在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯紐托 聖 波斯維爾斯享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford于1420年出生在苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II23岁，母亲Isobel de Home20岁。他于1445年与Margaret Douglas在苏格兰洛包爾聖 波斯維爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年5月8日在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯紐托 聖 波斯維爾斯享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Kerr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived by a marsh or swampy woodland, Middle English kerr ‘brushwood, wet ground’ (Old Norse kjarr). A legend grew up that the Kerrs were left-handed, on theory that the name is derived from Gaelic cearr ‘wrong-handed, left-handed’.
Americanized form of German   Kehr   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Carr
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Carra ‘descendant of Carra’, a personal name from the adjective corr ‘pointed’, explained as meaning ‘spear’. As an Ulster surname, Carr was often confused with Scottish Kerr .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Mac Giolla Chathair, a Donegal name meaning ‘son of Giolla Cathair’ or ‘the servant (i.e. devotee) of Saint Cathar’. Cathar was a priest and bishop, otherwise unknown.
Irish: in Galway, a shortened Anglicized form of Mac Giolla Chéire, see Keary .

variants.name: Caris
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from any of several places called Carr House or Carrhouse (examples of which are found in northern counties including Cheshire and Yorkshire), from Middle English kerr ‘wet ground’ or ‘brushwood’ (Old Norse kjarr; see Kerr ) + h(o)us ‘house’ (Old English hūs).
Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Macarius, from Greek Makarios ‘blessed’, a Christian saint's name.
Americanized form of German   Karis  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford was born in 1420, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II, was 23 and his mother, Isobel de Home, was 20. He married Margaret Douglas in 1445, in Saint Boswells, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 May 1481, in Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford est né en 1420, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isobel de Home, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Douglas en 1445, à Saint Boswells, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1481, à Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders: Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford 1420 in Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II 23 und seine Mutter Isobel de Home 20. Er hat 1445 in Saint Boswells, Roxburghshire, Scotland Margaret Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Mai 1481 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Douglas nel 1445, nel Saint Boswells, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessfordが1420年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth IIは23歳，母Isobel de Homeは20歳であった。1445年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアサイント ボスウエルズでMargaret Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年5月8日にイギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースニュートウン サイント ボスウエルズで61歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders: 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 뉴타운 세인트 보스웰스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford(이)가 1420년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isobel de Home(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1445년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 세인트 보스웰스에서 Margaret Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 5월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 뉴타운 세인트 보스웰스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders: нютоун сеинт босвеллс, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew Kerr of Auldbounburn and Cessford родился в 1420 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John de St. Clair - Laird of Polwerth II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isobel de Home, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Douglas в 1445 г. в местности сеинт босвеллс, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 мая 1481 г. в местности нютоун сеинт босвеллс, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

Se casó con Margaret Douglas en 1445, en Saint Boswells, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1481, en Newtown Saint Boswells, Scottish Borders, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
